title: verbascum chaixii subsp. austriacum
intro: Verbascum chaixii subsp. austriacum, commonly known as Austrian Mullein, is a biennial plant belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in antioxidants, which help to protect against cell damage and promote overall health benefits, including reducing stress and improving respiratory function. Austrian Mullein can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine, with the leaves often being used for their expectorant and soothing properties.
